Hey, welcome back. Okay, now it's time to start building campaigns. And when you're messing with the YouTubes, you want to test a lot of stuff. Pretty much the same thing applies, really, when you're doing any sort of ad platform, whether it's your YouTubes or your Facebooks and your Instagrams or your display networks or whatever. So the first thing we want to do with the understanding that we're going to have to be testing a lot of stuff is I want to make a template for your campaign. So when you go to test new campaigns, we can just use that template. Alright, and the reason we want to do that is because, like, if we mess up just a little bit of the settings on creating this campaign, we can totally hose ourselves. So if we get one template set up right, perfectly, and then when we start testing a bunch of different audiences and targeting and stuff, we know we're going to have, like, really minimize our chances of making a mistake in terms of, you know, maybe because we're tired or because we've set a lot of them up or whatever. So this is super easy. Just follow along with your homie. Okay, so let's go. Here I am. Now, you're probably noticing this is a different AdWords account than the one that we were using earlier. And this account is my normal account that I use regularly. And what I'm going to do is I'm going to create a campaign where, or a campaign template, rather, where the objective is to get people to opt in. And I figured that we would do it with these audiences we created, and we would do it using my AdChallenge. So you want to come over here to campaigns from your account. All right, so like, you may, you know, be anywhere in AdWords, but you always just want to be at this screen here. You want to make sure you see campaigns up here. That's where we want to go. All right, so I'm going to click on this little plus button, and we're going to create a new campaign. All right, and our mission in this one is I want to get opt-ins. Okay, and so I'm sending people to register in this case for an on-demand training. This could be webinar or, you know, Legion. It doesn't matter, right? But I want it to get opt-ins here. So I'm going to click on Leads. All right, and I'm going to, obviously, we're using your YouTube's there. So I'm going to click on Video. And this template specifically, what we're going to do is we're building this for when we're telling Google slash YouTube how much we're willing to pay for a specific conversion, and we'll get to that part later. All right, so like I said in an earlier video, there's lots of different bidding methodologies, and this one is for a specific style. All right, so first thing I'm going to do is I'm going to name this campaign. Now, this is going to be a template. So I'm going to call this one Template. All right, TCPA. Now, this stands for Total Cost per Actions. This is the bidding methodology. That's why I have that there. We do that right here. Okay, Template, TCPA. I'm going to do the date, which is today is the 23rd. All right, and this is going to be, I'll say this is for our ad class opt in. Now, whoops, there we go. The reason I'm doing this is because the specific ads we're going to be using here are for this ad class. And you'll see as we build stuff with other ads, we can still use this exact same template. We just change out the ads. So that can be easy. All right, so here we go. Thing number one, we've named it. We're good. We're not actually going to launch this, by the way. This is just a shell. The second thing we want to do is for this one, because we're going to tell Google how much we're willing to pay for an opt in, we're going to select this bid strategy. Okay, so like I've said earlier, you can do multiple things, you know, on AdWords, you can say, or YouTube is all the same thing. We can do just like Facebook, where you're like, all right, man, just go out and get me a bunch of conversions. You know, and let's just do that. And that'll spend all of your budget for the day, and it'll get you as many conversions as you can. And this one is what we're going to try first. And this is where we're like, hey, you know what, I'm willing to pay up to this much per conversion. And what you typically want to do is you want to bid, like, you know, three and a half times more than you're really willing to pay. And the reason you want to do this is because you won't actually pay that much. You just want to outbid the next guy, right? So what I'm willing to pay for an opt in, because we're going to call them, I don't really care if they buy my ads class or not. I just want a business owner who's interested in growing their business to get on my list. So I'm going to say I'm willing to pay right here. All right. Now, this is way more than I'm really willing to pay. I'm willing to pay 70 bucks. Okay. Now, I know that I'm not going to be charged $70. And I also know that I can lower this later. What I'm really willing to pay for a good lead, you know, like for someone who owns a business, I'm willing to pay about 20 bucks. You know, so this is about three and a half times that much right there. And so this is why I'm putting this here. If I actually end up paying $70 here, I'm not going to be messing with this and I'll change it. Now, I'm going to run this as a test. And so my test budget right here is going to be actually, I'll say $100 a day. Right? Now, it might not even spend this budget. It might say, dude, I can't get you leads for this much, but we'll see. All right. So this is my test budget for this particular campaign.
